mapper.sql: SELECT p.pw_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.last_modifier, p.type_id, t.type_name, p.requester_name, p.user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.dept_id AS user_dept_id, d.dept_name AS user_dept_name, p.approver_name, p.approved_at, p.status, p.rejected_by, p.rejected_at, p.reject_reason, p.account_id, p.changed_at, p.expire_at, p.change_reason, p.note FROM tb_password p JOIN tb_account_type t ON t.type_id = p.type_id JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_department d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id

where.if: AND (p.account_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND p.expire_at < CURDATE()
AND p.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND p.expire_at >= CURDATE() AND p.expire_at <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND (p.expire_at IS NULL OR p.expire_at > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY))

mapper.select: ORDER BY p.pw_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_password p JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN p.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND p.expire_at < CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired, SUM(CASE WHEN p.expire_at IS NOT NULL AND p.expire_at >= CURDATE() AND p.expire_at <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expiringSoon, SUM(CASE WHEN p.expire_at IS NULL OR p.expire_at > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal FROM tb_password p JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = p.user_id
AND u.dept_id = #{deptId} AND p.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_password SET last_modifier = #{lastModifier}, type_id = #{typeId}, requester_name = #{requesterName}, user_id = #{userId}, account_id = #{accountId}, changed_at = #{changedAt}, expire_at = #{expireAt}, change_reason = #{changeReason}, note = #{note} WHERE pw_id = #{pwId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_password WHERE user_id = #{userId}
